sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 138:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 138:1
items.html: Since the difference between VAK and GAR is great, it is utterly impossible for the light of Hesed, which is complete VAK, to be a male to the phase of Bina, which is GAR. (Inner Light, Item‎ 51)
